name: Potatoe Vegetable Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Potatoes, diced, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in onion; cook until tender.
3. Stir in flour, bouillon, thyme, and pepper. Cook until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
4. Gradually stir in milk and water; cook over medium heat until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly.
5. Add potatoes, ham, and vegetables. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender, stirring occasionally.
